description_long: This is a solid-body electric guitar with a single cutaway design, finished in a glossy black color. The body features two humbucker pickups, a three-way toggle switch, and two control knobs, likely for volume and tone adjustment. The neck is made of wood with a rosewood or similar dark fingerboard, marked with inlaid fret markers. The headstock is angled and fitted with six tuning pegs, three on each side, and gold hardware accents are visible throughout. The back of the guitar shows a control cavity cover, and the overall construction suggests a robust, high-quality instrument. The guitar's design is reminiscent of classic Les Paul-style models, suitable for a variety of urban music settings.
description: A glossy black, single cutaway electric guitar with gold hardware, dual humbucker pickups, and a classic Les Paul-style shape.
description_view_0: Front view showing the glossy black body, two humbucker pickups, control knobs, toggle switch, and the full fretboard with inlays.
description_view_1: Side profile highlighting the guitar's slim body depth, neck thickness, and the protruding hardware components.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the solid black back, control cavity cover, and the back of the headstock with tuning pegs.
description_view_3: Opposite side profile showing the edge of the body, neck, and hardware alignment.
attribute_headstock_design: Angled headstock with three tuning pegs per side, no visible logo, classic Les Paul-style shape
